title: A new Evangelion in 3010
wikitext:
[]: A new Evangelion in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Dec 08, 2017 6:58 pm From this Minna no Eva article about the Q&A khara had on their new Twitter account: 「新しいエヴァンゲリオンは出ますか？」という質問に対して「シン・エヴァで新しい機体が出る」というタレコミも。 In response to the question "Do you get a new evangelion?" There is also a suggestion that "a new aircraft will come out at Shin Eva."

[]: Re: A new Evangelion in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Dec 08, 2017 7:01 pm It's probably for Rei-Q. If Shinji is ever getting in a robot again? It's probably going to be Unit 01. Will this 'Aircraft' Eva actually fly? Or will it be like the glider pack Unit 02 wore in 2.22?

[]: Re: A new Evangelion in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Dec 08, 2017 7:26 pm I think aircraft is simply a wrong translation, or a technically right but out of context translation, and it doesn't imply a flying capability.

[]: Re: A new Evangelion in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Freeshinji » Fri Dec 08, 2017 8:10 pm Did I miss something? What is Shin Eva?

[]: Re: A new Evangelion in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Fri Dec 08, 2017 10:25 pm Freeshinji wrote: Did I miss something? What is Shin Eva?

[]: Re: A new Evangelion in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Dec 09, 2017 7:04 am I hear Japanese fans short-hand Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 to "Shin Eva." They do the same thing for the other movies, short-handing the titles by their Japanese theatrical titles rather than their numeric titles. The Japanese title for Evangelion 1.x is actually "Evangelion Jo," which roughly translates into "Evangelion Prelude." The numeric titles (Evangelion 1.0) are the international titles for the film. Evangelion 1.x = Eva Jo Evangelion 2.x = Eva Ha Evangelion 3.x = Eva Q Evangelion 3.x + 1.x = Shin Eva I adopted this way of referring to the film simply because "Shin Eva" is simpler to type that "Eva 3.0 + 1.0," and have begun using that same method for abbreviating the other films as well.

[]: Re: A new Evangelion in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by andreh » Sat Dec 09, 2017 8:34 am Joseki wrote: I think aircraft is simply a wrong translation, or a technically right but out of context translation, and it doesn't imply a flying capability.

[]: Re: A new Evangelion in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Dec 09, 2017 4:16 pm Machine translations are still absolute garbage for Japanese. This does not mean a flying Eva because kitai (機体) is more like fuselage/airframe than aircraft and a generic term that mecha anime has adopted.

[]: Re: A new Evangelion in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat Dec 09, 2017 6:56 pm ^ I've added your post in the OP so that it is clearer.
